title: Painless Vaginal Bleeding - Placenta Previa
chief_complaint: 30-year-old G3P2 at 32 weeks with sudden onset painless bright red vaginal bleeding. No trauma. No contractions. Previous C-sections x2.

physical_exam.abdomen: Soft, non-tender, uterus relaxed, fetal heart 150 bpm
physical_exam.speculum: Bright red blood in vaginal vault, closed cervix, no active bleeding currently

hidden_data.us_abd: Placenta completely covering internal os (complete previa), no retroplacental clot

correct_diagnosis: Complete Placenta Previa with Antepartum Hemorrhage
key_learning_points: Painless bleeding in third trimester = previa until proven
Previous C-section = risk factor (placenta accreta spectrum)
NO digital cervical exam (may precipitate hemorrhage)

patient_responses.bleeding: I woke up in a pool of blood, no pain

hints.management: No vaginal exam, prepare for C-section

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Placenta previa - NO digital exam.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is placenta previa. Painless bleeding + US findings confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: Complete previa: Admit, IV access, type and crossmatch 2 units. Betamethasone if <34 weeks. NO vaginal exams. Elective C-section at 36-37 weeks. Emergency C-section if heavy bleeding. Risk of placenta accreta with prior C-sections.
